entry.title: Send Payment Summary file by email from F110
entry.content:
Hello,

We are running F110 and instead of printing the Payment Summary, we would like to send it to certain users by email.  In the screenshot below, I clicked Spool Request -> Forward from the menu.  We would like to do something like this automatically.  I have seen several posts talking about BTE 00002040 and 00002050 but I think that is for Payment advices. If it can be changed to use the Summary, that would be great. 

Thank you for any suggestions.

entry.title: Custom fields in BAPI_NETWORK_COMP_ADD
entry.content:
Business has implemented the Badi BADI_MAT_CUST_SCR for extension of components in CJ20N.  This works fine, but there is a customer-specific process for creating Networks, activities and assign components.  In this process, BAPI_NETWORK_COMP_ADD is used to assign components.

How to include the custom fields via BAPI_NETWORK_COMP_ADD ?

These fields are saving in RSADD table.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Automate the closing and opening of FI and MM periods in S/4 Hana
entry.content: Is there any standard way to automate the closing and opening of FI and MM periods in S/4 Hana?

entry.title: About checking Standard price
entry.content:
Hi expert.

When posting confirmation for production order, there is an issue where the Standard Price used is the Standard Price from last month.
If there is a sudden need for production during the month, or depending on the timing of evaluation, last month's Standard Price may be used.
One way to avoid this is to perform a Costing Run at the end of the previous month, but this can be difficult in some cases.

At this time, is there a way to output a message when trying to evaluate using last month's Standard Price?
If possible, I would like to achieve this using only Standard Functions.

(Ver ECC6.0 EHP4)

Thank you

entry.title: Ledger of Ledger Group TP is not of type 'Prediction and ...' Message no. FCO_COPA701
entry.content:
While posting, t.code = VF01

Document 90000967 was saved (no journal entry was generated). But here, no FI document is generated.

This error was generated. 

Ledger  of Ledger Group TP is not of type 'Prediction and ...'

Message no. FCO_COPA701

Diagnosis

You want to post statistical SD conditions to accounting.
But ledger group TP contains a ledger that is not an extension ledger of type 'Prediction and Commitments'.

System Response

No accounting document is posted.

Procedure

Go to the IMG activityDefine Ledger Group' (ID: VC_FAGL_LDGRPMAP) and remove the ledger from ledger group TP.

entry.title: Dump when running Transaction FR04
entry.content: We use Former Budgeting . We try to change the Orignal Budget for year 2024 by using Transaction FR04, and after posting we get a message that "Update was terminated", and the proram is "DUMPED".

entry.title: Security Updates on "3034848 - List of VAT payers in Poland: (...)"
entry.content:
Hi,

We followed the steps described on sapnote "3291289 - List of VAT Payers for SAP S/4HANA (OVS): Implementation overview" up to the point of deploying the application from github "https://github.com/SAP-samples/localization-toolkit-s4hana-cloud-bank-account-validation."  on our Cloud Foundry

Our Integration team then became concerned that there's no security/authorization features in the application, which would allow anyone with the url from our java application to access the API and make calls.

Should we expect to have such improvements pushed to the official github of this application or such features are something to be customized by ourselves?

entry.title: SAP Business ByDesign bank statement with return and unification
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have a question about how to resolve a case and I wanted to know if anyone could help me.

I explain, I have three ids of outgoing payments with the following amounts:
- ID 5 - $500.00
- ID 6 - $250.00
- ID 7 - $250.00
When I receive my bank statement, it turns out that the bank accumulated the three IDs into a single outgoing amount, so I only have one outgoing transaction of $1,000.00. 
In addition to that, one of the payments was returned to me by the bank and I found out when I viewed my bank statement. 
So on my bank statement I have the following transactions:
- Outgoing - -$1.000,00
- Incoming - $250,00
When i do the payment allocation i have no idea how to separate the amount of the $250,00 that the bank returned, to mark it as a refund and then assign it to the $250,00 incoming.

I may have an idea of how to solve this but first I would like to know what it's your opinion

entry.title: Dunning: put whole run as 1 pdf on network location
entry.content:
Hi,

we are using with an external postal service.

how can we set all dunning letters from 1 run on a shared network location in 1 pdf file?

do we have to define a pdf-printer, or is there some BTE to be used?

kr

Nico

entry.title: Signed invoice
entry.content:
Hello everyone ;
i wanna know if there is a way in SAP than i can follow up signed invoice.
when the transporter give the marchendise to the clinet , the client , signed the invoice and return it to us , and we will wait the period that we agree about like a month..then we wll give to the agent that collect the money the signed invoice and give it back to the client and take the money . basicely we only follow up this with excel.but i want to integrated in sap .in excel we fellow up how many signed and also the invoice that the agent have and how much we hack in stock and the amount and the activity.its similar to what we have in ZCOB or FBL5N.

entry.title: No entry found in table FINSC_CMP_VERSNC for cocode BLPK, version 000
entry.content:
When i'm run transaction MIGO, have an error No entry found in table FINSC_CMP_VERSNC for cocode XXXX, version 000 (FINS_ACDOC_CUST205).

Do I have to run the tcode FINS_UPD_CMP_VERSN on each SAP client ?
FYI, my SAP has 3 clients : PROD, QA, DEV
Regards,
Cypriana S.

entry.title: Updating Bank master data after Golive with Migration Cockpit
entry.content:
Hello

I found a line in the migration object information help for "Bank" as below. 

Do Not Overwrite Existing Data

This is an indicator field to determine whether or not to overwrite an existing bank.

If the indicator field is empty, the system overwrites an existing bank. If you don’t want to overwrite an existing bank, enter X.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/cc9ecc5f5f6b400a98d10e930324f7ad/216ce7ce1cad45a68e2486ca4203da69.html?locale=en-US

It seems we can perform mass change for bank master data in the system. I thought it would be great if we can still use this function on a daily base even after Golive. For example, item field: Bank Groups or text.

Does anyone know if that is possible and have the experience?

Kind Regards,

Eitaro

entry.title: How to automate DP91 (Resource Related Billing) on Fiori?
entry.content:
Business requirement to automate Resource Related Billing (DP91) through Fiori. Is there an RFC that can be used for calling the same from Fiori portal and create a RRB sales order? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Table or T-code where Asset class can be found in SAP PM module?
entry.content:
Hi All,

Can anyone help me with T-code or table for Asset class column in SAP PM?

Requirement: I have an Asset class column in my SAP FI-AA Component (ANLA Table -- ANLKL column) which is numeric (data ex: 120076) so now I have to map the same to SAP PM module for calculation, but not sure in which table or T-code this Asset Class can be found in SAP PM module tables (ex: AUFK or EQUI or EQUZ or etc..) 

It would be a great help if anyone can provide the T-code or table.

Thanks in advance:)

entry.title: REFX - ERROR WHEN REVERSE SETTLEMENT
entry.content:
Hi Experts

I have a problem to reverse a settlement. 

The reverse posting has successfully done, but when trying to proceed with RESRRV, it throw error message - 

"Cashflow record ... is no longer a planned item"

I have check all seems to be ok. Appreciate any help

entry.title: Restriction of transaction code
entry.content:
We are localizing an authorization and role for support users when functional test the transaction codes there were data's that can view  globally.

We understand that not all transaction code has the restriction for organization level.

Sample is for tcode OBY6 functional can see data from other countries and we have checked in Su24 there is no auth obj being pulled and one is for SE16 we understand that this can be limit only based on the table auth group.

Is there a possibility to restrict certain transaction codes on specific country only? These involved mostly with IT Support tcodes?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: The credit check is not preformed for the sales scheduling agreement
entry.content:
We have configured the credit check for Sales order - scope item BD9. However when we create a scheduling agreement the credit check status is 'Not Performed'. How do we setup the credit check for scope item 3NR?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Payment medium without payment advices
entry.content:
Hi,

We are in need of the following. We need to get the file to send to the Bank in a diferente moment from the moment we send the payment advices to vendors

So we  would like to know how  we can obtain the payment method in the F110 transaction without sending payment notices by email

Is this possible?

Thank you in advance

João

entry.title: slow-moving indicator - wrong value
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

during SAP public cloud implementation we found differences in Slow or Non-moving materials app.

Based on the SAP help https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/32da8359c8ee4e8b8e8c5e15cacba5aa/276b1b645ec64e808e430b363d6efd6b.html?profile=20087413&source=productlink-webassistant the value for slow-moving indicator should be 5,49. But in the system, we have value 5,14.

Qcons = 45

Qstock = 19955

NOdays = 15

 

Do you have any ideas about what could cause these differences?

entry.title: Grants Management GMDERIVE is not working, system is not creating actual documents for Grant Budget
entry.content:
Hi Experts.

I have configured GM-GTE; I am able to create all master data of FM GM, the budget as well. Accounting docs also post to ledger 90. Update types are good
GM derivation created but not working
system is not creating actuals for sponsors classes. Or system is not consuming budget or Actuals (EXP/REV) are not updating in Grants Management, and there is no error. Trace on GMDERIVE is also not working
